common.notFoundDescription: The page you're looking for doesn't exist.

errors.emailRateLimit: Too many sign-in emails requested in a short time. Please wait a moment and try again.
errors.retryAfterSeconds: For security reasons you can request a new link only after {seconds} seconds. Please wait and try again.

auth.magicLinkSent: Check your email! We sent a sign-in link to {email}.
auth.checkInbox: If you don't see it, check your spam folder.
auth.resendAfter: You can request a new link in 60 seconds.
auth.linkExpired: The link has expired or was already used. Request a new sign-in link.
auth.heroDescription: No more manual copying. Brixa automatically generates invoices in your chosen billing system from data stored in Moxie.
auth.emailHint: Enter your email and we'll send you a sign-in link.
auth.cookieNoticePrefix: We only use cookies that are strictly necessary for the operation of the service. See our
auth.heroTagline: The bridge between your project and your invoices.
auth.noPassword: No password, no registration – just enter your email and you're in.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.recentInvoicesCount: {count, plural, =0 {No recent invoices} one {# recent invoice} other {# recent invoices}}
dashboard.noInvoicesDesc: Create your first invoice manually or configure the Moxie integration.
dashboard.quickActionsDesc: Create a new invoice or check your settings.

invoices.title: Invoices
invoices.count: {count, plural, =0 {No invoices} one {# invoice} other {# invoices}}
invoices.refreshNoUpdate: No open invoices in the app.
invoices.refreshNoUpdateChecked: {count} open invoice(s) checked, no new payments.
invoices.refreshMoxieWarning: {updated} invoice(s) paid but Moxie notification failed:

invoicesNew.title: New invoice
invoicesNew.itemsWithCount: {count, plural, =0 {No items} one {# item} other {# items}}
invoicesNew.name: Name

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Configure your subscription, Moxie connection, billing provider and scheduling in one place.
settings.deleteAccountDescription: Request account deletion. Your subscription will be cancelled immediately; your account will be suspended for 14 days and can be restored by logging in.
settings.dataHandlingParagraph1: We only use cookies that are strictly necessary for the operation of the service: session and authentication, security, and (when you use billing) payment-related cookies. We do not use analytics or marketing cookies, and we do not track you across sites. For this reason we do not show a cookie consent banner.
settings.dataHandlingParagraph2: For a full description of how we process your data, your rights, and how long we keep data, see our data protection notice.

deleteAccount.title: Permanently delete account?
deleteAccount.step1Warning: This action cannot be undone. Please read carefully.
deleteAccount.subscriptionCancelled: Your subscription is cancelled immediately (you will not be charged again).
deleteAccount.accountSuspended: Your account is suspended for 14 days; we keep your data during this period.
deleteAccount.restoreWithin14: If you log in within 14 days, you can restore your account with one click and your data will remain. (You will need to subscribe again if you want the subscription.)
deleteAccount.deleteAfter14: If you do not log in within 14 days, we permanently delete your account and all data, and we will email you to confirm.
deleteAccount.dataDeleted: We permanently delete your profile, organization, invoices, settings and subscription data. We do not retain this data after deletion (except where required by law).
deleteAccount.suspendedToast: Your account has been suspended. You have 14 days to restore it by logging in.
deleteAccount.deletedEmailSubject: Your account has been permanently deleted
deleteAccount.deletedEmailBody: Your account and all associated data have been permanently deleted as requested.
deleteAccount.pendingTitle: Your account is scheduled for deletion
deleteAccount.pendingDescription: You requested account deletion. If you do nothing, your account and data will be permanently deleted after 14 days and we will email you.

deleteAccountErrors.requestFailed: Failed to request deletion. Please try again.
deleteAccountErrors.restoreFailed: Failed to restore account. Please try again.
deleteAccountErrors.restoreExpired: The 14-day period has passed. Your account has been or will be permanently deleted.
deleteAccountErrors.invalidConfirm: Please type DELETE exactly to confirm.

subscription.guardMessage: Activate your subscription in Settings to use Moxie and billing connection.
subscription.sectionDescription: Choose a monthly or yearly plan. Subscription is required to use Moxie and billing connection.
subscription.manageSubscriptionHint: Invoice, payment method, and cancellation in Stripe.

moxie.apiKeyAlreadySaved: API key is already saved. Only enter a value to replace it.
moxie.statusSetupIncomplete: Moxie or billing not set up or not working
moxie.webhookHint: In Moxie go to Webhooks, add this URL as an endpoint, and map the "InvoiceSent" event. When you set an invoice to Sent, Moxie will call this URL and we will issue the invoice.

errors.notConfigured: Moxie is not configured. Set Base URL and API key first.
errors.baseUrlNotFound: The Moxie URL was not found. You can paste the full URL from Moxie (e.g. https://pod01.withmoxie.com/api/public); the app uses the server address.
errors.invalidApiKey: Invalid API key. Check the key in your Moxie settings.
errors.forbidden: Access denied. Check your API key and permissions in Moxie.
errors.connectionFailed: Could not reach the Moxie server. Check the Base URL and your internet connection.
errors.testFailed: Connection test failed. Please check your Base URL and API key.

errors.noOrganization: No organization is linked to your account.
errors.subscriptionRequired: A subscription is required to use this feature.
errors.billingNotConfigured: Billing provider is not configured. Set up Billingo or Számlázz.hu in Settings.
errors.invoiceCreateFailed: Failed to create invoice. Try again or check your settings.
errors.checkoutFailed: Failed to start checkout. Please try again.
errors.portalFailed: Failed to open subscription management. Please try again.
errors.noSubscription: No subscription found. Please subscribe first.
errors.invalidPriceId: Invalid plan selected. Please choose a plan again.
errors.stripeCustomerInvalid: Subscription record is invalid or was created for testing. Please subscribe again below.
errors.pricesLoadFailed: Failed to load prices. Please try again later.

billingoValidation.blocked: Invoice generation was blocked because of Billingo requirements: one or more fields are missing or invalid.
billingoValidation.missingField: The following required field is missing: {field}.
billingoValidation.missingFields: The following required fields are missing: {fields}.
billingoValidation.invalidValue: The "{field}" field has an invalid value.
billingoValidation.invalidValueWithDetail: The "{field}" field has an invalid value (item {value}).
billingoValidation.fixAndRetry: If you fix the data, you can try again (e.g. set the invoice to Sent in Moxie).

szamlazzValidation.blocked: Invoice generation was blocked because of Számlázz.hu requirements: one or more fields are missing or invalid.
szamlazzValidation.missingField: The following required field is missing: {field}.
szamlazzValidation.missingFields: The following required fields are missing: {fields}.
szamlazzValidation.invalidValue: The "{field}" field has an invalid value.
szamlazzValidation.invalidValueWithDetail: The "{field}" field has an invalid value (item {value}).
szamlazzValidation.fixAndRetry: If you fix the data, you can try again (e.g. set the invoice to Sent in Moxie).

billing.invoiceDefaultsHint: Used when the Moxie invoice does not provide these values.
billing.defaultBlockIdHint: Choose from your Billingo document blocks; the first is usually Billingo's default.
billing.blocksLoadError: Could not load invoice blocks. Check your API key.
billing.billingoSendByEmailHint: This only works when the customer has an email address set (e.g. in Moxie client details).
billing.ipnHint: Paste this URL in the field at the bottom of Számlázz.hu Account settings / Invoicing basics. When a document's paid amount changes on Számlázz.hu, the system sends the notification to this URL and payment status updates automatically.

currencySettings.sourceIntro: When conversion is needed (client or invoice in another currency), choose the exchange rate source here.
currencySettings.mnbDailyHint: The current MNB mid-rate is applied every day.
currencySettings.manualRateHint: You set the rates to use (1 unit of currency = N HUF).
currencySettings.mnbWeekendNote: MNB rates are updated on business days; on weekends the last business day rate applies.
currencySettings.manualUsdEurHint: Optional. If empty, EUR–USD is derived from EUR–HUF and USD–HUF.

scheduleSettings.daysLabel: On which days should automatic invoicing run?
scheduleSettings.timeWindowHint: If enabled, invoicing will only run within the specified time window.

onboarding.title: Setup wizard
onboarding.welcomeSubtitle: Let's set up everything you need for automatic invoicing in just a few steps.
onboarding.subscriptionDesc: A subscription is required to use the Moxie and billing integrations.
onboarding.moxieDesc: Enter your Moxie instance URL and API key.
onboarding.moxieHelpBaseUrl: Where do I find the Base URL?
onboarding.moxieHelpBaseUrlText: In your Moxie admin panel, go to Settings → API to find your instance URL.
onboarding.moxieHelpApiKey: Where do I find the API key?
onboarding.moxieHelpApiKeyText: In your Moxie admin panel, go to Settings → API to create an API key.
onboarding.moxieHelpWebhook: How do I set up the webhook in Moxie?
onboarding.moxieHelpWebhookText: In Moxie, go to Settings → Webhooks, add the URL above as an endpoint, and map the InvoiceSent event.
onboarding.moxieSavedNext: Moxie connection saved! Click Next to continue.
onboarding.billingDesc: Choose your billing software and enter your access credentials.
onboarding.billingHelpBillingo: Where do I find the Billingo API key?
onboarding.billingHelpBillingoText: In the Billingo admin panel, go to Settings → API connection to find and create your API key.
onboarding.billingHelpSzamlazz: Where do I find the Számlázz.hu agent key?
onboarding.billingHelpSzamlazzText: In Számlázz.hu, go to Settings → Connected apps to create your agent key.
onboarding.billingAdvancedSettings: Advanced Billingo settings (invoice block, payment method, etc.) can be changed on the Settings page.
onboarding.billingSavedNext: Billing provider saved! Click Next to continue.
onboarding.tweaksDesc: These are optional – the defaults work well in most cases. You can change them anytime in Settings.
onboarding.completeSubtitle: Automatic invoicing is ready to go.
